name: What do I do first if I slip and fall at my job in Boise?
description: Report immediately to supervisor, get authorized medical care, file Form 122.[1][2]

mainEntity.name: What do I do first if I slip and fall at my job in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report immediately to supervisor, get authorized medical care, file Form 122.[1][2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Report the injury to your supervisor immediately, seek medical treatment from an authorized provider, and file Form 122 with the workers' comp division.[1][2] Delaying report raises proof and credibility problems, so document everything like emails or photos.[2] Key factors: on-the-clock injuries are presumed work-related; follow medical instructions to avoid benefit suspension; employer must file First Report within 7 days.[1] Notify in writing, attend all appointments, and don't switch doctors without approval.[1] Early action maximizes benefits.
